## beehiiv tiers replace

Replace a premium tier

### Synopsis

Update a tier

Update an existing tier belonging to a specific publication

API path: /publications/{publicationId}/tiers/{tierId}

```
beehiiv tiers replace <tierId> [flags]
```

### Examples

```
beehiiv tiers replace tier_123 --body @tier.json
beehiiv tier set tier_123 --body @tier.json
```

### Options

```
      --body string         Provide a request body as inline JSON, @path, or - for stdin
  -h, --help                help for replace
      --query stringArray   Add a repeatable query parameter in key=value form
```

      --api-key string          Override the Beehiiv API key
      --base-url string         Override the API base URL
      --compact                 Print compact JSON

      --rate-limit-rpm int      Override the internal rate limit
      --raw                     Shorthand for --output raw
      --table                   Shorthand for --output table
      --timeout string          Override the request timeout, e.g. 45s
      --verbose                 Print request and response details to stderr
